# Rayyan Raza

> Physics Researcher

## Posts
- [Dynamics of Spin Qubits in Semiconductor Quantum Dots](http://localhost:45323/my_personal_website/posts/spin-qubits-intro/): A brief overview of spin qubit Hamiltonian dynamics and gate implementations.
- [Energy Efficiency in Reversible Quantum Circuits](http://localhost:45323/my_personal_website/posts/reversible-computing-effeciency/): Analyzing the thermodynamic limits of computation through reversible logic gates.
